welcome: Welcome! Let's set up Codesquad for your project.
atLeastOneIde: Please select at least one IDE.
chooseIdes: Which IDEs/tools do you use? (select all that apply)
chooseStack: What's the project's primary stack? (pre-fills the squads' test/lint commands)
step1Codex: 1. See AGENTS.md in your project root for Codex instructions
step1Antigravity: 1. Open Antigravity, type / in the chat and select codesquad to get started.
step1Cursor: 1. Open Cursor, type / in the chat and select codesquad to get started.
step1Opencode: 1. Open OpenCode and type /codesquad to get started.
ideNotAvailable: ⚠️  "{label}" is not available yet. Choose another option.
enterNumber: Please enter a number between 1 and {max}.
alreadyInitialized: ⚠️  Codesquad is already initialized in this directory.
alreadyInitializedHint: Use Claude Code and type /codesquad to get started.
step1ClaudeCode: 1. Open this directory in Claude Code
step2ClaudeCode: 2. Type /codesquad to start the onboarding wizard
step3ClaudeCode: 3. Follow the prompts to set up your company profile
updateNotInitialized: No Codesquad installation found. Run 'init' first.
updateLatestHint: 💡 Tip: Use 'npx codesquad@latest update' to always get the newest version.
skillsNotInitialized: No Codesquad installation found. Run 'init' first.
skillsUnknownCommand:
Unknown skills command: {cmd}
  Usage: codesquad skills list|install|remove|update
chooseSkills: Which skills do you want to install? (optional)
skillsSkipped: You can install skills later with: npx codesquad install <name>
agentsNotInitialized: No Codesquad installation found. Run 'init' first.
agentsInstallHint: Install with: npx codesquad agents install <id>
agentsUnknownCommand:
Unknown agents command: {cmd}
  Usage: codesquad agents list|install|remove|update
step1VsCodeCopilot: 1. Open this directory in VS Code
step1QwenCode: 1. Open this directory in Qwen Code
step1GeminiCli: 1. Open this directory in Gemini CLI
step2Trae: 2. Type /codesquad in the chat to get started
tokenCostWarning: Running squads consumes AI tokens (paid). Monitor your usage in your IDE or AI provider dashboard.
squadsNotInitialized: Codesquad isn't initialized here. Run `npx codesquad init` first.
squadsInstallHint: Install one with: npx codesquad squads install <name>
squadsAlreadyInstalled: '{id}' is already installed. Reinstall and overwrite? (y/N)
